texts.full_text: decisions because of its jurisdiction on appeal or award interest to compensate it for delays in securing reimbursement while waiting months pending resolution before arbitration bodies whose actions may effectively deny them full measure deserved under our system’s fundamental principles governing these matters should have been settled long ago instead being left unresolved more than half-year. For the reasons indicated, the motion is granted. *417 FACTS AND PROCEDURAL HISTORY Contichem unknowingly chartered from Parsons an apparently unseaworthy ship, the M/V World Rainbow (the "Rainbow"). Because of delays in shipping caused by Rainbow's technical and maintenance deficiencies, Contichem incurred damages that it estimates at approximately $3 million. While the underlying merits of Contichem's claims against Parsons were submitted to an arbitration panel

texts.full_text: this country, can be addressed through our existing legal frameworks to maintain public safety without infringing on individual rights; harnessing collective strength against those who incite lawlessness will help preserve the nation's image. Although this country is not alien to violence or vandalism, we should do everything within our laws to ensure that those who elevate violence, cherish vandalism are dealt with by the laws of the land. In fact, it is high time we rose against acts that tarnish the image of the country.
